page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 30마리의 랍스터 꼬리를 준비하여 먹방 방송을 시작합니다. 그녀는 음식이 많지 않아 포만감을 주지 않을 것이라 예상하지만, 맛있게 먹기 위해 도전을 시작합니다. 랍스터 꼬리의 식감과 맛에 대해 설명하며, 일부 고기는 부서지기 쉽지만 맛있다고 평가합니다. 특히, 찐 랍스터가 더 부드럽고 맛있다고 언급합니다.

[00:00 ~ 01:33] Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I prepared 30 lobster tails
It doesn't look like a lot of food
It's not going to fill me up
We'll start the mukbang anyway Bon appetit
Today..
I made it so that they're easy to eat
Will it scoop out?
Come out!
Oh no, the meat is all ripped up
It tastes good though
It's not salty at all
It's tasty, that's all that matters
Finally, the right one
I wanted to scoop it out, but it won't work

metadata.title: 랍스터테일 30마리 시켰는데.. 간에 기별도 안오네요 ㅠㅠ 불닭소스,랍스터 먹방 Korean mukbang eating show
metadata.next_overlap:
[01:43 ~ 04:51] Yum
This one's not too bad
The mayo dipping sauce is tasty
This one was cooked in the oven

page_content:
문맥: 쯔양이 30마리의 랍스터 꼬리를 먹으며 다양한 조리 방식에 따른 맛과 식감을 평가하는 장면입니다. 먼저, 오븐에 구운 랍스터 꼬리의 경우 껍질이 단단해 먹기 어렵고, 소금기가 강하지만 여전히 맛있다고 평가합니다. 이어서 찐 랍스터는 더 부드럽고 맛이 좋다고 언급하며, 크기가 작아 한 입에 두 개를 먹을 수 있을 정도라고 말합니다. 마지막으로, 따뜻한 랍스터의 짭짤한 맛을 새롭게 발견하고 만족감을 표현합니다.

[01:43 ~ 04:51] Yum
This one's not too bad
The mayo dipping sauce is tasty
This one was cooked in the oven
But the shell is too hard for me to crack
The one cooked in the oven is extremely salty
The meat is ripped up inside
It's still delicious
The steamed ones taste better They're a lot softer
I can tolerate it because it's soft
This one is cut in half
Let's take a bite
Let's bring the scissors
This is so much easier
This is as big as the black tiger shrimp
Okay, maybe these are a bit bigger
[06:06 ~ 10:00] Raggedy
Tattered lobster
They're pretty small so I think I can fit 2 in 1 bite
Isn't it the first time I scooped one out this pretty?
I didn't know when they were warm, but now I can taste all the saltiness
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
